title: AI Daily Life Toolkit | 30 Day AI Challenge PDF with Prompts and Templates Instant Download
description:
Ready to actually use AI every single day? This 30-day challenge gives you one AI task per day — each takes under 15 minutes and delivers real results.

You get 30 daily challenges, 120+ prompts, 4 printable habit-tracker sheets, and a weekly review template — all in one organized PDF.

Build an AI habit that sticks, save time on daily tasks, and discover which AI tools actually fit your life.

Instant delivery after purchase — start Day 1 today.

Files included: PDF (printable, 48 pages), 4 habit-tracker sheets, prompt cheat sheet.

Add to cart and take the 30-day challenge.

pricingStrategy.priceJustification: Mid-tier pricing suits broad consumer audience. Challenge format creates perceived value of structured program. Printable habit trackers add tangible product feel to digital download, justifying price above bare prompt packs.
